# Market Research and Application  

Dehuan Liu Editor- in- Chief  

Peking University Press

text_blocks.text_content: The practice of market research has been developed in China for more than 20 years. This book collects, organizes, summarizes, and enriches the latest achievements of market research. It covers various areas such as market segmentation and positioning, product testing, marketing channels and their management research system, business district research, branding research, advertising research, etc. This comprehensive coverage provides answers to the problems faced by marketing practitioners at all stages of corporate marketing. The book is suitable for academic marketing majors as a textbook and is also useful for business managers and related practitioners.

Dehuan Liu, male, holds a Ph.D. in Sociology from Peking University. He serves as the Vice Dean of School of Journalism and Communication at Peking University, the Deputy Director of Center for Market and Media Research at Peking University, and the President of National Market Research Association. His major publications include the national key textbooks Modern Market Research, Market Survey Textbook, Market Survey, Theoretical Basis and Practical Methods of Social Survey, Perspectives on Chinese People's Reading Lives, and Survey on Project Hope, among others. He has published over 40 papers, including "Questionnaire Design," "Analysis of Influential Factors on Internet Dependence," "Research on Beijing Newspaper Odd- Listing Market," and "The Application of Age Variable in Data Analysis," among others.
Editor: Jing Zhou, Jing Ren, Lijing Zhou Cover Design: Spring Studio

## Market Research and Application  

The practice of market research has been developed in China for more than 20 years. This book collects, organizes, summarizes, and enriches the latest achievements of market research. It covers various areas such as market segmentation and positioning, product testing, marketing channels and their management research system, business district research, branding research, advertising research, etc. This comprehensive coverage provides answers to the problems faced by marketing practitioners at all stages of corporate marketing. The book is suitable for academic marketing majors as a textbook and is also useful for business managers and related practitioners.  

Dehuan Liu, male, holds a Ph.D. in Sociology from Peking University. He serves as the Vice Dean of School of Journalism and Communication at Peking University, the Deputy Director of Center for Market and Media Research at Peking University, and the President of National Market Research Association. His major publications include the national key textbooks Modern Market Research, Market Survey Textbook, Market Survey, Theoretical Basis and Practical Methods of Social Survey, Perspectives on Chinese People's Reading Lives, and Survey on Project Hope, among others. He has published over 40 papers, including "Questionnaire Design," "Analysis of Influential Factors on Internet Dependence," "Research on Beijing Newspaper Odd- Listing Market," and "The Application of Age Variable in Data Analysis," among others.  

Editor: Jing Zhou, Jing Ren, Lijing Zhou  Cover Design: Spring Studio  

Price: 30CNY
